description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a smooth, glossy layer of pastel pink icing covering the top half. The icing drips slightly over the edge in several places, creating a natural, appetizing look. The donut itself has a light golden-brown color, indicating a soft, fluffy interior typical of yeast-raised donuts. It is presented on a simple, round white ceramic plate, which contrasts with the vibrant icing. There are no visible toppings or decorations on the icing, giving it a clean and minimalist appearance. The donut appears fresh and ready to eat, making it an inviting treat in any urban food setting.
description: A golden-brown ring donut with glossy pink icing, presented on a white plate. The icing drips naturally over the edges, with no additional toppings.
description_view_0: Front view of the donut showing the pink icing with a prominent drip at the front, resting on a white plate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a larger icing drip on the right side, with the donut's golden-brown base visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing a smoother icing edge and more of the donut's plain surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a distinct icing drip at the front, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
attribute_icing_type: Glossy pink sugar icing, smooth with natural drips over the edge.
